# Outputs Directory

This directory contains generated output files from the image captioning prototype.

## Generated Files

After running `uv run python -m caption_prototype.run`, this directory will contain:

- **results.csv** - Structured test results with all 10 test cases
- **results.json** - Machine-readable detailed results
- **failure_examples.md** - Documented failure analysis (8+ examples)

These files are generated automatically and should be reviewed alongside the documentation files in the repository root.
